customer_messages.body: We are reaching out regarding your account with us. Our team has identified concerns requiring immediate attention related to: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline. Our recovery team has been engaged and the appropriate owners have been notified to coordinate resolution. We are committed to ensuring your experience meets the standards you expect. A dedicated representative will be in contact with you shortly to discuss next steps and a resolution timeline.
